title: Introduction to Database Relationships Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the core types of database relationships.

questions.question: Which relationship type would you use for a User and their single Profile?
Which relationship type would you use for an Author and all the books they have written?
Which relationship type describes Students and the multiple Courses they can be enrolled in?
What is the primary mechanism for maintaining relationships in relational databases?
How can you model relationships in NoSQL databases like MongoDB?
